domainMap: Center: Building / Space / Store (mass-market retailer physical stores & real estate, next decade, esp. AI). Branches: Labor/Work & Operations (frontline TMs, work tasks); Supply Chain (storage & receiving, fulfilment, delivery format, goods transportation); Infrastructure (utilities: energy/water/compute, parking, location, layout/format); Construction (3D printing methods, materials, trade workers + equipment); Retail Industry (competitors); Tech (AI, physical AI, robotics, computer vision, automation); People & Human System (shopping/commerce, transaction, inspiration & discovery, connection & community, experience, transportation & mobility, demographic shifts, migration); Policy/Regulation/Finance (zoning, insurance, regions); Sustainability & Environment (heat, climate events, circular/regenerative).
arxivQueries: all:"built environment" AND all:"machine learning" AND all:building
openalexQueries: adaptive reuse big box retail conversion
